message:
feat(cli): add workspace support, markdown export, sprint/metrics robot commands, and historical revision loading

Extend bvr with several major feature groups to close the gap with the
Go reference implementation:

Workspace support:
- Multi-repo workspace loading via .bv/workspace.yaml configuration
- Issue ID namespacing with configurable prefixes to prevent collisions
- Per-repo enabled/disabled toggle and custom beads paths
- serde_yaml dependency added for workspace config parsing

New robot commands:
- --robot-sprint-list: enumerate sprints with envelope metadata
- --robot-sprint-show <id>: sprint detail by ID
- --robot-metrics: timing, cache, and memory metrics output

Markdown export:
- --export-md <path>: export issues to structured markdown
- --no-hooks: skip pre/post-export hook execution
- Hook system with timeout, env vars, and YAML configuration
- Full test suite for export with hook lifecycle validation

Historical analysis:
- --as-of <revision>: load issues from any git revision
- --force-full-analysis: bypass incremental analysis caches
- --repo filter: filter issues by source repo name

Robot module extended with comprehensive unit tests for robot-docs,
robot-schema, and envelope metadata validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
